info.name: VidU Backend API
info.description:
Public reference for the **VidU** HTTP API.

**Success envelope:** `{ "success": true, "message": string, "data": … }`. Optional top-level **`meta`** only appears on explicitly paginated endpoints.

**Errors:** `{ "success": false, "message": string }`. **Validation** (Zod) may add `{ "errors": { "fieldErrors", "formErrors" } }`.

**Money:** amounts are **decimal strings** (PHP, two fractional digits) unless noted.

**Timestamps:** ISO-8601 UTC strings.

**Layout:** top-level **Me** (shared Profile / Payment methods / Platforms / creator submissions inbox), **Brand** (nested **Campaigns** + **Submissions** → `brand/campaign.routes.ts`, `brand/submissions.routes.ts`), **Creator** (nested **Campaigns** + **Submissions** + **OAuth** → `creator/campaign.routes.ts`, `creator/submissions.routes.ts`, `creator/oauth.routes.ts`), then **Webhooks**, **Uploads**, **Admin**.

**Auth:** Supabase JWT as `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>`. Use **`brandBearerToken`** for `/brands/...`. **`GET /campaigns` and `GET /campaigns/:id` are public** (no Bearer). Use **`creatorBearerToken`** for authenticated creator routes under `/campaigns` (e.g. submission preview/confirm) and other creator flows.

Example bodies are **illustrative**; replace UUIDs and values with your environment.

**Ledger:** no in-process reconciler cron — use `POST /admin/reconcile-campaign/:campaignId` with HTTP **Basic** auth (`ADMIN_BASIC_USER` / `ADMIN_BASIC_PASSWORD`).

request.description:
Partial update. **status** and **coverImageObjectKey** can change any time (subject to other rules, e.g. publish floor when setting active).

**title**, **description**, **platforms**, **ratePer1k**, **rules**, **referenceLinks**, **assetUrls** are allowed only while the campaign is **draft** or the campaign has **no submissions** yet. Otherwise the server responds with **409** `campaign_details_locked`.

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description: Same policy as the saved request.

item.name: Campaigns

request.description:
**Public — no `Authorization` required** (marketing site + app).

**Query (all optional; strict — unknown keys → 400):**
- **`status`:** `all` (default) = non-draft campaigns (`active`, `paused`, `ended`); `active` | `paused` | `ended` narrows to that lifecycle state. **Never** returns `draft`.
- **`platform`:** `tiktok` | `facebook` — campaign must include this platform in its `platforms` JSON array.
- **`sort`:** `newest` (default) = `updatedAt` descending; `highest_rate` = `ratePer1k` descending, then recency.

**Response `data`:**
- **`items`:** preview cards (max **`limit`** 50).
- **`filters`:** echo of applied query.

Each list item: **`id`**, **`brandName`**, **`title`**, **`description`**, **`status`**, **`platforms`**, **`coverImageUrl`**, **`brandLogoUrl`**, **`totalBudget`** (net pool after the platform deposit fee), **`consumedBudget`** (paid out + reserved for in-flight submissions), **`updatedAt`**.

response.name: 200 OK (with items)

request.description:
**Public — no `Authorization` required.** Returns `{ "campaign": … }` for one discoverable campaign (`active` | `paused` | `ended`). **404** if draft, missing, or not discoverable.

The **`campaign`** object includes brief fields, **`rules`**, **`referenceLinks`**, **`assetUrls`**, **`ratePer1k`**, plus **`totalBudget`** and **`consumedBudget`** (same semantics as the list). No `grossBudget`, `spentBudget`, or `availableBudget`.

response.name: 200 OK

item.description: Public discovery (`GET /campaigns`, `GET /campaigns/:id`). Submissions routes still require a creator Bearer token.

request.description: Query: `page`, `limit`, optional `status`. Each item includes **`payout`** (PHP string, creator net for that row). Brand gross is not returned.

originalRequest.description: Query: `page`, `limit`, optional `status`. Each item includes **`payout`** (creator net, PHP). Brand gross is omitted.

request.description:
**Body:** `url` (canonical content URL), `platform` (`tiktok` | `facebook`).

Server fetches **live view/like/comment counts** via the creator's linked platform account; client-supplied counts are ignored.

**403** `creator_default_payment_method_required` if no default creator payout method (same as **POST** `/campaigns/:id/submissions`). **401** `platform_reconnect_required` if platform tokens need refresh. **400** if URL invalid or views below product threshold.

originalRequest.description:

**Body:** `url` (canonical content URL), `platform` (`tiktok` | `facebook`).

request.description:
Same **`url`** + **`platform`** as preview. Persists submission with server-computed `views_locked`, `funded_views`, amounts, optional `partialReason`.

**403** `creator_default_payment_method_required` if no default creator payout method. **401** `platform_reconnect_required` if platform tokens need refresh.

**409** cases include `campaign_not_active`, `duplicate_submission`, `below_minimum_payout`, pool caps.

originalRequest.description: Same **`url`** + **`platform`** as preview. **403** / **401** / **409** as on the saved request.
No default creator payout payment method.

Same **`url`** + **`platform`** as preview. Persists submission with server-computed `views_locked`, `funded_views`, amounts, optional `partialReason`. **409** cases include `campaign_not_active`, `duplicate_submission`, `below_minimum_payout`, pool caps.

item.description: R2-compatible **presigned `PUT`**. **Brand JWT** only. Requires `R2_*` env; see `docs/environment.md`.

item.name: Admin

request.description:
**Purpose:** Repair denormalized campaign budget fields from the ledger after data fixes or drift.

**Behavior:** Reads all `ledger_entry` rows for the campaign, aggregates by type, then updates the campaign: `grossBudget` = sum(**deposit**) − sum(**refund_available**); `spentBudget` = sum(**release**). Returns those amounts as decimal strings (PHP, two fractional digits). **Note:** **adjustment** rows are not included in this recompute—only the three types above—so cached `grossBudget` may differ from campaign reality if manual adjustments exist.

**Auth:** Folder HTTP Basic (`ADMIN_BASIC_*`).

**Path:** `campaignId` = campaign UUID (route param `id` on the server).

originalRequest.description:
**Purpose:** Repair denormalized campaign budget fields from the ledger after data fixes or drift.

**Behavior:** Reads all `ledger_entry` rows for the campaign, aggregates by type, then updates the campaign: `grossBudget` = sum(**deposit**) − sum(**refund_available**); `spentBudget` = sum(**release**). Returns those amounts as decimal strings (PHP, two fractional digits). **Note:** **adjustment** rows are not included in this recompute—only the three types above—so cached `grossBudget` may differ from campaign reality if manual adjustments exist.

**Auth:** Folder HTTP Basic (`ADMIN_BASIC_*`).

**Path:** `campaignId` = campaign UUID (route param `id` on the server).

request.description:
**Purpose:** Record a manual **adjustment** on the campaign ledger (corrections, goodwill credits, etc.) and bump the campaign’s cached `grossBudget` by the same signed gross amount.

**Behavior:** In one transaction, creates a `ledger_entry` with `ledgerType` **adjustment** (`amountGross`, `note`, `idempotencyKey`) and **increments** `campaign.grossBudget` by `amountGross`. Amounts are decimal strings in PHP (two fractional digits) like the rest of the API.

**Idempotency:** If a ledger row already exists with the same `idempotencyKey`, the handler returns **200** with `data: { "duplicate": true }` and does **not** apply the adjustment again.

**Body (JSON):**
- `amountGross` (string, required)
- `note` (string, required) — audit trail text
- `idempotencyKey` (string, required) — unique key for this adjustment

**Auth:** Folder HTTP Basic (`ADMIN_BASIC_*`).

**Path:** `campaignId` = campaign UUID.

request.description:
**Purpose:** Support / moderation escape hatch to mark a creator submission **rejected** immediately, without going through the normal brand review flow.

**Behavior:** Updates the submission to `status: "rejected"` and sets `rejectionReason` to **`admin_force`** so downstream reporting can distinguish admin actions.

**Auth:** Folder HTTP Basic (`ADMIN_BASIC_*`).

**Path:** `submissionId` = submission UUID. **Body:** none.

**Path:** `submissionId` = submission UUID. **Body:** none.

request.description:
**Purpose:** Read-only **audit / investigation** bundle for a single campaign—useful when reconciling money, tracing ledger history, or reviewing all submissions in one call.

**Behavior:** Loads the **campaign** row (404 if missing), all **ledger** entries for that campaign ordered **oldest → newest**, and **all submissions** tied to the campaign.

**Auth:** Folder HTTP Basic (`ADMIN_BASIC_*`).

**Path:** `campaignId` = campaign UUID.

item.description:
Operator-only routes under `/admin` protected by **HTTP Basic** auth (`ADMIN_BASIC_USER`, default `admin`, and `ADMIN_BASIC_PASSWORD`). Set collection variables **`adminUsername`** / **`adminPassword`** to match the server.

**Endpoints:** **Reconcile** refreshes cached campaign budgets from deposit/refund/release ledger sums. **Ledger adjust** appends a manual adjustment and bumps `grossBudget` (idempotent by `idempotencyKey`). **Force reject** sets a submission to rejected with reason `admin_force`. **Audit** returns campaign + ledger + submissions for investigation.
